info.title: HR Context Tool
info.description: Validates that WatsonX Orchestrate context variables (clientID, name, role, user_name, email_id) are injected into the askHR_agent instructions and forwarded by the LLM as tool arguments.

servers.description: ngrok tunnel to local mcp_hr_context_server.py on port 8000

bearerAuth.description: WxO injects the user Bearer token into the Authorization header on every outbound tool call (Pattern B)

post.summary: Get HR context for the current user
post.description: Receives the five WxO context variables passed by the LLM from the agent instructions and returns a validated HR context summary. Call this whenever the user asks about their HR profile, context, or identity.

clientID.description: Client identifier from WxO context — pass exactly as received in instructions

name.description: User display name from WxO context — pass exactly as received in instructions

role.description: User role from WxO context — pass exactly as received in instructions

user_name.description: Username / login from WxO context — pass exactly as received in instructions

email_id.description: Email address from WxO context — pass exactly as received in instructions

status.description: success if all 5 context variables were received, partial otherwise

context_variables_received.description: The five context variables as received by the server

all_context_variables_present.description: True if all five variables arrived non-empty

missing.description: Names of any context variables that were missing or empty

hr_summary.description: Human-readable HR profile summary built from the context variables

bearer_identity.description: Identity extracted from the Authorization header JWT (Pattern B)
